details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written once; verification checks pass: attachments were all read earlier, ordered newest-first among selected oldest-3 set, recipient matches canonical Miles email, subject quoting is valid. Next complete inbox cleanup.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task fully executed: read and interpreted inbox request, resolved identity and entity, selected and attached oldest 3 invoices, wrote outbound draft, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Processed the inbox request and prepared a reply draft with the requested oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm ops manager (Claudia Reiter). Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example with the three invoice attachments, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, resolved identity via cast primary_contact_email, used canonical entity identifier path to find finance records, wrote exactly one outbox file, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox note requested reply with oldest 3 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm. Canonical entity resolution identified Claudia Reiter (operations manager; claudia@helios-tax.example) in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Helios-linked invoice records were found in 50_finance/invoices, and the oldest three by issue date were 2025-12-18 (INV-0006), 2026-01-19 (INV-0007), and 2026-02-17 (INV-0008), each explicitly listing related_entity Claudia Reiter. Reply draft was created to canonical sender Miles (miles@novak.example) and inbox item was removed per inbox-processing cleanup rule.
